message.content: Heydon confirming. Yes, those are the two blocking items. Here are the exact changes: **1. aria-labels with waiting_on disambiguation** In `templates/waiting_for_item.html`, change all three: - Line 10: `aria-label="Edit: {{ item.title }} ({{ item.waiting_on }})"` - Line 23: `aria-label="Received: {{ item.title }} ({{ item.waiting_on }})"` - Line 33: `aria-label="Delete: {{ item.title }} ({{ item.waiting_on }})"` In `templates/waiting_for_edit.html`, change one: - Line 37: `aria-label="Cancel editing: {{ item.title }} ({{ item.waiting_on }})"` **2. `` element for date display** In `templates/waiting_for_item.html`, line 6 change from: ```html {{ item.date_added }} ``` to: ```html {{ item.date_added }} ``` In `src/routes/waiting_for.rs`: - Add `date_added_iso: String` to `WaitingForView` struct - In `build_view()`, add: `date_added_iso: item.created_at().format("%Y-%m-%d").to_string()` That's everything. Once both are in, I'll re-verify and approve.
